name: Default
description: The engine's standard policy baseline brought to v1 parity, applied to the member policy of EVERY managed group (blank PolicyTemplate links here). Expiration: EndUser/activation max P1D, Admin-Assignment max P365D, Admin-Eligibility max P365D, all required. Enablement: MFA + Justification on EndUser-Assignment (activation) AND Admin-Eligibility; none on Admin-Assignment. Notification matches the Entra defaults. Carries NO Approval rule, so the engine never touches an approval rule it did not itself apply.
